name: Mattervault Chat V5 (With Persistence)
description: Complete chat workflow with conversation persistence, message history, and audit logging. Chat-UI becomes a thin presentation layer.

parameters.query:
=-- Get or create conversation
WITH existing AS (
  SELECT id, title FROM conversations 
  WHERE {{ $json.conversation_id ? "id = '" + $json.conversation_id + "'" : "FALSE" }}
  AND user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO conversations (user_id, family_id, title)
  SELECT '{{ $json.user_id }}', '{{ $json.family_id }}', '{{ $json.conversation_title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  RETURNING id, title
)
SELECT id, title, 'existing' as source FROM existing
UNION ALL
SELECT id, title, 'new' as source FROM inserted;

=-- Save user message
INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, role, content)
VALUES ('{{ $json.conversation_id }}', 'user', '{{ $json.question.replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
RETURNING id;

=-- Get recent chat history (last 10 messages before current)
-- Returns exactly one row with JSON array (empty array if no history)
SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t) ORDER BY t.created_at ASC), '[]'::json) as history
FROM (
  SELECT role, content, created_at FROM messages
  WHERE conversation_id = '{{ $json.conversation_id }}'
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 10 OFFSET 1
) t;

=-- Save assistant message
INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, role, content, citations)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.conversation_id }}',
  'assistant',
  '{{ $json.response_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.citations).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
RETURNING id;

=-- Log audit record
INSERT INTO audit.chat_query_logs (
  correlation_id, n8n_execution_id, user_id, paperless_username,
  client_ip, user_agent, family_id, conversation_id,
  query_text, response_text, documents_retrieved, documents_cited, total_latency_ms
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Format Response').first().json.correlation_id }}',
  '{{ $execution.id }}',
  '{{ $('Format Response').first().json.user_id }}',
  {{ $('Format Response').first().json.paperless_username ? "'" + $('Format Response').first().json.paperless_username + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Format Response').first().json.client_ip ? "'" + $('Format Response').first().json.client_ip + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Format Response').first().json.user_agent ? "'" + $('Format Response').first().json.user_agent.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $('Format Response').first().json.family_id }}',
  '{{ $('Format Response').first().json.conversation_id }}',
  '{{ $('Format Response').first().json.question.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Format Response').first().json.response_text.replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 10000) }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Format Response').first().json.documents_retrieved || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Format Response').first().json.citations || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ Date.now() - $('Format Response').first().json.request_start_time }}
)
RETURNING id;

=-- Save empty response as assistant message for no-results case
INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, role, content)
VALUES ('{{ $json.conversation_id }}', 'assistant', '{{ $json.response_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
RETURNING id;
